name: 90 Minute Dinner Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together 3/4 cup flour, sugar, salt, and undissolved yeast.
2. Heat the milk, water, and oleo until warm (120-130°F).
3. Gradually add the warm liquids to the dry ingredients.
4. Beat for 2 minutes at medium speed.
5. Add an additional 1/4 cup flour. Beat for 2 more minutes at high speed.
6. Stir in enough flour to make a soft, smooth dough.
7. Knead until smooth.
8. Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces and shape into balls.
9. Arrange the shaped balls in a greased 8-inch round pan.
10. Cover and let rise until doubled in bulk.
11. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes.
